description_long: This is a brown paper grocery bag with a rectangular base and vertical sides, commonly used for carrying food or retail items. The front of the bag features bold black printed text reading 'NANCY CABRERA RESTAURANTE & REPOSTERIA' along with a phone number and website, indicating it is branded for a specific restaurant. The paper material is slightly crumpled and creased, especially along the sides and top edge, giving it a used and realistic appearance. The bag is open at the top, with no visible handles, and the interior appears empty. The back side is plain with no visible markings or designs. The overall structure is typical of disposable grocery bags found in urban environments, suitable for carrying lightweight goods.
description: A brown paper grocery bag with restaurant branding, open at the top and showing creases and folds, with no visible handles and an empty interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the restaurant branding and printed text, with the bag open at the top and visible creases.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's depth, pronounced creases, and the absence of handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unmarked brown paper surface with visible folds and no branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bag's width, crumpled paper texture, and open top.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Yes, black printed text with 'NANCY CABRERA RESTAURANTE & REPOSTERIA' and contact information.
